column1: #mapping_set_description: Mappings from Skygest Energy Vocabulary TechnologyOrFuel concepts to ENTSO-E PSRType codes

column8: ENTSO-E B16 covers solar PV and solar thermal; sevocab is PV-specific
ENTSO-E B05 is hard coal only; sevocab:Coal is broader (includes brown coal)
ENTSO-E B04 is fossil gas broadly; close enough for 1:1
ENTSO-E B15 is residual renewables not captured by other codes; sevocab is the aggregate
